Extract visible text from the current page (or a CSS selector). Capped at 50k chars.

Empty/whitespace-only extractions return ``ok: False``. This is the gate
that prevents the leaf agent from emitting a ``CompetitorFinding`` off a
page that loaded but yielded no text (JS-rendered SPA, paywall, 404 body).

Role: Researcher for OpenAI.
Prior-run context:
(no prior context)

Task: investigate the competitor and emit a single CompetitorFinding JSON object with non-empty `summary` (≥50 chars) and an http(s) `source_url`.

Tool-budget: at most ONE successful web_navigate + ONE web_extract_text. Stop after extracting text and emit the CompetitorFinding immediately.

If a tool returns `ok: false` (DNS error, timeout), DO NOT retry the same URL. Try ONE alternative URL at most, otherwise emit a best-effort CompetitorFinding with `source_url` set to the last URL you attempted and `summary` describing what is publicly known about the competitor.

IMPORTANT: Do NOT output any explanatory or planning text. Your only text output must be the final CompetitorFinding JSON.

When providing your final answer, respond with a JSON object matching this schema: {'competitor': str, 'summary': str, 'source_url': str, 'notes': str | None}. Output only valid JSON.

tools.name: web_navigate
tools.description:
Navigate the per-Execution browser to ``url``. Returns final URL + title.

Returns a structured ``{"ok": False, "error": ...}`` on navigation failure
(DNS, timeout, TLS) instead of raising — raised exceptions trip agentspan's
consecutive-failure circuit breaker and disable the tool mid-Execution.

tools.name: web_extract_text
tools.description:
Extract visible text from the current page (or a CSS selector). Capped at 50k chars.

Empty/whitespace-only extractions return ``ok: False``. This is the gate
that prevents the leaf agent from emitting a ``CompetitorFinding`` off a
page that loaded but yielded no text (JS-rendered SPA, paywall, 404 body).

Navigate the per-Execution browser to ``url``. Returns final URL + title.

Returns a structured ``{"ok": False, "error": ...}`` on navigation failure
(DNS, timeout, TLS) instead of raising — raised exceptions trip agentspan's
consecutive-failure circuit breaker and disable the tool mid-Execution.

tools.name: web_extract_text
tools.description:
Extract visible text from the current page (or a CSS selector). Capped at 50k chars.

Empty/whitespace-only extractions return ``ok: False``. This is the gate
that prevents the leaf agent from emitting a ``CompetitorFinding`` off a
page that loaded but yielded no text (JS-rendered SPA, paywall, 404 body).

Empty/whitespace-only extractions return ``ok: False``. This is the gate
that prevents the leaf agent from emitting a ``CompetitorFinding`` off a
page that loaded but yielded no text (JS-rendered SPA, paywall, 404 body).

(no prior context)

tools.description:
Navigate the per-Execution browser to ``url``. Returns final URL + title.

Returns a structured ``{"ok": False, "error": ...}`` on navigation failure
(DNS, timeout, TLS) instead of raising — raised exceptions trip agentspan's
consecutive-failure circuit breaker and disable the tool mid-Execution.

tools.name: web_extract_text
tools.description:
Extract visible text from the current page (or a CSS selector). Capped at 50k chars.

Empty/whitespace-only extractions return ``ok: False``. This is the gate
that prevents the leaf agent from emitting a ``CompetitorFinding`` off a
page that loaded but yielded no text (JS-rendered SPA, paywall, 404 body).

messages.message:
Role: Researcher for OpenAI.
Prior-run context:
(no prior context)

Task: investigate the competitor and emit a single CompetitorFinding JSON object with non-empty `summary` (≥50 chars) and an http(s) `source_url`.

Tool-budget: at most ONE successful web_navigate + ONE web_extract_text. Stop after extracting text and emit the CompetitorFinding immediately.

If a tool returns `ok: false` (DNS error, timeout), DO NOT retry the same URL. Try ONE alternative URL at most, otherwise emit a best-effort CompetitorFinding with `source_url` set to the last URL you attempted and `summary` describing what is publicly known about the competitor.

IMPORTANT: Do NOT output any explanatory or planning text. Your only text output must be the final CompetitorFinding JSON.

When providing your final answer, respond with a JSON object matching this schema: {'competitor': str, 'summary': str, 'source_url': str, 'notes': str | None}. Output only valid JSON.
${competitor_1_ctx_inject.output.result}

tools.name: web_navigate
tools.description:
Navigate the per-Execution browser to ``url``. Returns final URL + title.

Returns a structured ``{"ok": False, "error": ...}`` on navigation failure
(DNS, timeout, TLS) instead of raising — raised exceptions trip agentspan's
consecutive-failure circuit breaker and disable the tool mid-Execution.

tools.name: web_extract_text
tools.description:
Extract visible text from the current page (or a CSS selector). Capped at 50k chars.

Empty/whitespace-only extractions return ``ok: False``. This is the gate
that prevents the leaf agent from emitting a ``CompetitorFinding`` off a
page that loaded but yielded no text (JS-rendered SPA, paywall, 404 body).
